name: google-health-sidecar
author: Yuto Tachibana
description: 単一ユーザー向け Google Health sidecar(ボディメイク特化)。Cloudflare Workers + D1 + PWA + MCP。

scripts.db:apply:local: pnpm --filter @ghs/web exec wrangler d1 migrations apply ghsidecar --local
scripts.db:apply:remote: pnpm --filter @ghs/web exec wrangler d1 migrations apply ghsidecar --remote
